new_claims.claim_text: The U.S. naval blockade on Iran is now officially underway.
new_claims.notes: Claim from a news aggregation account; comments suggest it's unverified.

new_claims.claim_text: California legislators are trying to make investigating fraud illegal.
new_claims.notes: Claim by Elon Musk regarding legislative action. Needs verification.

new_claims.claim_text: A scientist from Yemen showcased a concept for an AI prison of the future Cognify proposes locking criminals in special capsules and reeducating their brains with false memories generated by neural networks.
new_claims.notes: Concept for AI prison raises ethical concerns. Needs deeper investigation into source and feasibility.
